name: Beaulah Wintheiser Jr.
aboutMe: Hi, I'm Beaulah, a general handyman and also licensed plumber with over 12 years of experience in providing high-quality plumbing services. I bring my expertise and commitment to every job and pride myself on offering reliable, affordable solutions for both residential and commercial clients. I understand the urgency of maintenance issues and aim to complete every job efficiently while ensuring long-lasting results. With me, you can trust that the problem will be solved the right way, every time.

ratings.userComment: Fixed the leak under my sink but took longer than expected. Got the job done.
Showed up on time and cleared the clog fast. Very professional, will definitely book again.
Pipe he replaced started leaking again two days later. Very disappointed.
Took three visits to fix what should've been a simple water heater issue. Not great.
Left a mess in my bathroom and the problem wasn't fully resolved. Would not hire again.
Prices seemed fair but the work was sloppy. Had to call someone else to finish the job.

name: Sarah Rippin
aboutMe: Hello, I'm Sarah, a skilled carpenter with a passion for transforming spaces through custom woodwork. From furniture creation to home renovations and everything in between, I specialize in crafting beautiful, functional pieces that suit your needs and style. I've been in the carpentry business for 15 years and pride myself on my attention to detail and dedication to craftsmanship. Whether you need a new bookshelf, kitchen cabinetry, or custom woodwork for your home or office, I'll work closely with you to bring your vision to life, with a focus on quality materials and expert techniques.

ratings.userComment: Built a beautiful floating shelf for my living room. Clean finish and sturdy. Very happy.
The cabinet doors weren't aligned properly. She offered to come back but I'd lost confidence.
Sarah built us a custom dining table and it's absolutely stunning. Exceeded expectations.
Showed up late and the deck boards she installed were uneven. Requested a refund.
Decent work on the bookcase but communication could've been better throughout.
Trim work was okay but took twice as long as quoted. Not the best experience.
Installed new kitchen cabinets and the quality is top notch. Very detail-oriented.
She did fine work on the window frames. Nothing exceptional but solid and reliable.
Framed out our new mudroom perfectly. Arrived on time and cleaned up after herself.
Got the fence repaired but had to follow up a few times to get her scheduled.
Stair railing she installed came loose within a week. Felt unsafe. Very disappointed.
The wood she used didn't match what we discussed. Felt like a bait and switch.
Custom built-in wardrobe looks incredible. Exactly what I envisioned, maybe even better.
Replaced all the baseboards in my hallway. Nice clean lines and a fair price.
Finished product looked okay but she left sawdust everywhere and didn't offer to clean up.
The deck she built had gaps between boards that she said were 'normal.' Not happy at all.
Solid work on the pantry shelves. Nothing fancy but they're sturdy and level.
Had to remind her multiple times about details we'd agreed on. Frustrating experience.
She built a workbench for my garage. It's functional but not the prettiest finish.
Incredible craftsmanship on our custom office desk. Looks like it came from a high-end store.
Door frame repair was fine. A bit pricey for the scope of work but no complaints otherwise.
She seemed rushed and it showed in the work. Had to touch up the edges myself.
She transformed our plain staircase into something really special. Absolutely loved the result.
The shelves she installed pulled away from the wall within days. Complete waste of money.
Showed up without the right tools and had to reschedule. Poor planning and communication.
Average work on the closet framing. Took longer than expected and felt overpriced.
Great job on the kids' bunk bed frame. Sturdy, safe, and finished ahead of schedule.
Replaced my rotting porch boards and it looks great. Reasonable price for the quality.
She built a window seat with storage for our reading nook. Looks lovely and very practical.
Hired Sarah for a full kitchen reframe and the results were flawless. Highly recommend.
She built a really clean TV console unit for us. Good attention to detail and friendly too.
Measurements were off and the cabinet she built didn't fit the space. Very frustrating.
She fixed our broken drawer slides. Quick job, fair price, nothing to complain about.
Installed crown molding in two rooms. Looks decent but a few corners aren't perfectly mitered.
The fence gate she built sticks and doesn't close properly. Still waiting on a fix.

name: Kevin Leannon
aboutMe: Hi there! I'm your go-to gardener for everything from routine lawn maintenance to creating your dream garden. With over 8 years of experience in landscape design and horticulture, I'm passionate about helping you nurture and beautify your outdoor spaces. I offer a wide range of services including garden design, lawn care, tree trimming, and seasonal planting. I believe every garden has potential, and I work with you to enhance your green space, whether it's a backyard retreat or a professional landscape. Let's make your garden flourish!

ratings.userComment: Mowed and edged the lawn fine but missed a few spots along the fence line.
Trimmed the hedges unevenly. Had to go back and fix them myself. Expected better.
Kevin completely redesigned my backyard and it looks amazing. Super knowledgeable and creative.
Seasonal planting done perfectly. My front yard has never looked this good. Highly recommend.
Decent lawn care service. Reliable but nothing above and beyond. Fair price though.
Trimmed the trees in my backyard and cleaned everything up nicely. Would hire again.

name: Melinda Champlin
aboutMe: I am a seasoned carpenter with a keen eye for design and detail. I’ve been in the business for over 14 years, offering everything from custom cabinetry to home renovations. I believe that well-crafted woodwork adds warmth and character to any space, and I love collaborating with clients to bring their ideas to life. Whether you need a new set of stairs, custom doors, or a complete kitchen overhaul, I have the experience and tools to get the job done. Let’s turn your home improvement ideas into a reality with beautiful, functional carpentry.

Whether you're looking for custom furniture, built-in shelving, or a full home renovation, I have the skillset and attention to detail needed to bring your vision to life. My work is rooted in craftsmanship, and I focus on high-quality materials to ensure that every piece I create lasts for years to come. If you need a reliable carpenter, I’d love to help you build something special.
